name: trace-omitted-when-not-requested
note: Without route_trace the Decision carries no trace key: the matched-request trace is empty and route_decision_to_json drops the field.

name: trace-omitted-when-explicitly-false
note: An explicit route_trace:false behaves exactly like omitting it — no trace key.

name: trace-any-short-circuits-on-first-true
note: route_trace:true records one entry per evaluated leaf; 'alpha' makes the any's first child true, so the regex child is never evaluated and the deterministic leaf carries no score/label/rationale.

name: trace-accumulates-across-missed-rule
note: The trace accumulates every leaf up to the match: missed any-rule contributes both false children, then all-rule matches and the not(max_chars) child is still traced with its own raw result (false).

name: trace-all-short-circuits-and-default-carries-trace
note: all-rule's first child ('charlie') is false, so the all short-circuits and the not(max_chars) child is dropped from the trace; fail-open to default still carries the accumulated trace.
